calendar.matters:
Motion For Order Setting Aside Dismissal Of The Case
Off Calendar Jul-19-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEEARING RE: PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.'s Motion For Order Setting Aside Dismissal Of The Case.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's unopposed Motion for Order Setting Aside Dismissal of the Case is granted.

Plaintiff is ordered to file a Motion for Entry of Judgment Pursuant to the Stipulation of the Parties within 15 calendar days of the filing of this order.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare and submit a proposed order.

Judge: Rochelle C. East; Clerk: S. Kane; Not Reported. (302/RCE)

Notice Of And Motion For Order Setting Aside Dismissal Of The Case
Off Calendar May-10-2024 Off Calendar
